flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at College of Menominee Nation fell 50% between 2019 and 2022 (100.0% → 50.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of Menominee Nation rose 61% between 2021 and 2024 (160 → 258).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of Menominee Nation rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (28.2% → 31.7%).
